1pE.last_failure_summary: random filter choices matched >15 rows in 10 attempts (query too broad)

qa_pairs.question: Who enrolled exactly in month 11 where the school is smc?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT person.name FROM person
JOIN enrolled ON person.name = enrolled.name
WHERE enrolled.month = 11 AND enrolled.school = 'smc'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which person entities having at least one related enrolled record (linked on person.name = enrolled.name) with month equal to '11' and school equal to 'smc'?

qa_pairs.question: Which people were enrolled at smc in month 6?
qa_pairs.sql:

qa_pairs.question: Who has been enrolled at the school occ for at least 15 months?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT person.name FROM person
JOIN enrolled ON person.name = enrolled.name
WHERE enrolled.school = 'occ' AND enrolled.month >= 15
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which person entities having at least one related enrolled record (linked on person.name = enrolled.name) with school equal to 'occ' and month at least '15'?
